retrieve_object: Pick up and bring a named object directly to the user. No navigation required.
locate_object: Find where an object is. Do not pick it up or bring it.
scan_environment: Look around or inspect the area. No specific object is targeted.
navigate: Go to a place or destination. No object interaction of any kind.
multi_step_retrieve: A two-part command: first travel to a location, then bring back a specific object.
multi_step_manipulation: Pick up an object and place or reposition it somewhere else. Not delivered to user.
